Page 'Captains Fish and Chicken, INC | Cedar Rapids IA' exists. SERP shows 100% recommend (17 reviews). Not directly fetchable (auth wall).

Published 2024-10-28. Opening at 1616 1st Ave NE (former Gutamex Restaurant Elenita / Brick City Grill space). Owner Ray Aqel; previously opened and sold the same restaurant model in MN, IL, MI; first Iowa location. Soft opening late Oct 2024; menu breadth described; fresh-to-order.

Published 2025-05-14. Second Captains location soft-opened 2025-05-13 at 3100 6th St SW (former Bea's Cafe, next to Checkers Tavern); phone for THAT location 319-362-3114 — never use for NE. That location has since become Pita Kabab (same owner).

No Gazette article surfaced directly this sweep; SERP summaries attribute Ray Aqel/opening details to Gazette reporting but the article itself was not retrieved. The live site carries a Gazette press mention (cornmeal breading, lemon-pepper seasoning) sourced during v2. Gazette sides-delta question to owner remains unanswered.

Aggregator-generated microsite presenting itself as the restaurant's official website ('The official site is https://captains-fish-and-chicken.res-discover.com/'). Correct NAP and hours (Mon-Thu 11-10, Fri-Sat 11-11, Sun 11-8); menu prices mirrored ($8.99-$84.99 wings dinners, banana pudding, lemon cake). Competes with the real owned site in SERPs.
Menu-mirror listing exists per SERP (52402). Direct fetch blocked (HTTP 403).
Directory listing exists ('Updated March 2026'). Direct fetch blocked (HTTP 403).
Google Maps mirror: 4.4 stars / 192 reviews, NAP matches NE location, hours Mon-Thu 11-10, Fri-Sat 11-11, Sun 11-8. No website listed.
STALE: lists 'Captains Fish and Chicken INC - 3100 6th St SW' — address is now Pita Kabab.

Exact-domain web search does not yet surface the owned site (launched 2026-07-08, one day before this sweep — expected indexing lag). Site verified live by direct fetch. GSC submission/backlink from GBP website field would accelerate indexing.
Confirms 3100 6th St SW is now Pita Kabab (Mediterranean, same owner), phone (319) 440-3709, own site pitakababcr.com. Disambiguation content on the Captains site stands; SW remains out of scope.
Menu directory listing for 52402 exists per SERP; not fetched.

findings: NAP is consistent across all in-scope sources: Captains Fish and Chicken, 1616 1st Ave NE, Cedar Rapids, IA 52402, (319) 221-1040.

The business now HAS a live owned web presence: https://captains-fish-chicken.netlify.app (launched 2026-07-08 by this engagement, verified live 2026-07-09). This is the headline CHANGE versus all prior sweeps.
The owned site is not yet visible in SERP index checks (one day post-launch); aggregators (res-discover) still outrank/claim official-site status.
Aggregator/mirror hours agree: Mon-Thu 11AM-10PM, Fri-Sat 11AM-11PM, Sun 11AM-8PM — but remain owner-unconfirmed; live site correctly caveats them.
Google rating mirrored at 4.4 stars (Wanderlog mirror shows 192 reviews; owner cited 208 on 2026-07-07 — rating value consistent, count differs, mirror likely stale).
Facebook page active with 100% recommend across 17 reviews (SERP snapshot).
Press (KHAK 2024-10-28): owner Ray Aqel, first Iowa location, opened Oct 2024 in former Gutamex/Brick City Grill space, fresh-to-order model previously run in MN/IL/MI.

Menu breadth corroborated by press and aggregators: fried chicken, tenders, wings, gizzards, perch, tilapia, catfish, cod, calamari, crab cakes, shrimp; sides okra, hush puppies, onion rings, breaded mushrooms, fries, mac & cheese; desserts banana pudding, lemon cake, chocolate cake.
One SERP summary mentioned an 'estimated health score of 98 out of 100' — origin unverified aggregator metric; do not use on-site.
Delivery coverage for the NE location: DoorDash, Uber Eats, Postmates, Grubhub, Seamless all list the store.

discrepancies.detail: Yelp (captains-fish-and-chicken-cedar-rapids-2), Grubhub (11805992), and WanderBoat still carry live 'Captains Fish and Chicken' listings at 3100 6th St SW, but that location is now Pita Kabab (same owner). Risk: customer and AI-answer confusion between locations.

discrepancies.resolution: Owner action required: request closure/'moved' status on stale SW listings. Site-side disambiguation content already stands; SW stays out of scope.

discrepancies.detail: Owner cited Google 4.4/208 (2026-07-07, carried on the live site with attribution). Wanderlog's Google mirror shows 4.4/192. Rating value agrees; count differs — mirror snapshot age unknown.
discrepancies.resolution: Non-blocking. Keep the on-site citation attributed and dated as owner-provided; refresh from GBP directly at next owner touchpoint.

discrepancies.detail: res-discover.com microsite declares itself the restaurant's official site while the true owned site is captains-fish-chicken.netlify.app.
discrepancies.resolution: Owner action: set GBP website field to the owned URL (and any future custom domain); consider requesting correction/removal of the aggregator microsite claim.

discrepancies.detail: All aggregators agree on Mon-Thu 11-10, Fri-Sat 11-11, Sun 11-8, but the owner has never confirmed hours directly. Structured-data hours on the live site remain conservative (Mon-Thu + Sun) with caveated display text.
discrepancies.resolution: Keep call-to-confirm caveat until owner confirms; questionnaire item remains open.

ownerResidueQuestions: Confirm the weekly hours (aggregators show Mon-Thu 11-10, Fri-Sat 11-11, Sun 11-8) so structured hours can drop the conservative caveat.
Gazette sides delta: does the printed sides list match your current menu paste (2026-07-07)? Menu ships as paste until answered.
Logo file drop: the shark-captain logo file (navy/gold) is still pending; a placeholder is live.
Authorize/ask Yelp and Grubhub to close or mark moved the stale 3100 6th St SW 'Captains' listings (now Pita Kabab).
Set the GBP website field to https://captains-fish-chicken.netlify.app (accelerates indexing; counters the res-discover official-site claim).
Any plan for a custom domain to replace the netlify.app subdomain?
Confirm call-only remains the contact policy (no lead form, no SMS) — unchanged from your declaration.
